column6: Agent framework (MIT library only; NOT the Elastic-licensed LangGraph Platform)
Optional distributed ETL (off by default); NOTICE bundled
SEPARATE SERVICE / mere aggregation; source: licenses/source-offer.md
OPTIONAL feature store (Layer 4, off); source: licenses/source-offer.md
LOCAL DEV-ONLY S3 stand-in; AGPL, NEVER bundled/redistributed (SeaweedFS is the bundled option)
Self-hosted model runtime (modelServer); OpenAI-compatible. Engine only — model weights pulled at runtime, see the model-weights rows below.
DEFAULT modelServer.model. Apache-2.0 (OSI-permissive) — the self-hosted default is Apache-clean. Weights pulled at runtime by Ollama, NOT redistributed here (bundled=no).
